source_pr.title: executor: remove some useless code and avoid some redundancy check
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Remove some useless code and avoid some redundancy check.

### What is changed and how it works?
Remove `finished` in all DMLs. Avoid once null check when filling the rows.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

PTAL @coocood 

Merge it with https://github.com/pingcap/tidb-test/pull/623

symptoms: tk.MustQuery(`SELECT * FROM t1 order by f1;`).Check(testkit.Rows("1 0", "2 2")) (executor/write_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery(`SELECT * FROM t1 order by f1;`).Check(testkit.Rows("1 0", "2 2")) (executor/write_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery(`SELECT * FROM t1 order by f1;`).Check(testkit.Rows("1 0", "2 2")) (executor/write_test.go)

files: executor/builder.go, executor/delete.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/insert.go, executor/insert_common.go, executor/load_data.go, executor/replace.go, executor/write.go, executor/write_test.go, table/column.go, table/column_test.go, types/datum.go
